query:
ALTER TABLE properties 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `nationalAddress` varchar(500) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `buildingPermitNo` varchar(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `approvalStatus` enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'approved',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `maintenanceBudget` decimal(15,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `maintenanceSpent` decimal(15,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `vacantSince` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `vacancyReason` varchar(255) NULL;

ALTER TABLE properties 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `nationalAddress` varchar(500) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `buildingPermitNo` varchar(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `approvalStatus` enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'approved',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `maintenanceBudget` decimal(15,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `maintenanceSpent` decimal(15,2) NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `vacantSince` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `vacancyReason` varchar(255) NULL;
